author.bio: We love posting Shots, talking to Film Twitter, and telling stories about favorite movies and shows. It's that simple. Inquiries: hello@filmschoolrejects.com
author.name: One Perfect Shot

content.text: #TheMagicians spent five spellbinding seasons telling deeply human stories about deeply human characters that just so happen to live in a world that has magic. https://ops.fyi/2UgAQ3B
